title: Checkpoint/resume unificado + DLQ smoke

acceptance_criteria.text: Job interrompido após N páginas → resume não reprocessa fatias success já checkpointadas
rate_limited → resume posterior retoma fatia pendente
evidence: adapters leave pending checkpoints on rate_limited (not watermark advance)

acceptance_criteria.text: Registro poison → DLQ; job principal não trava; smoke documentado
evidence: make resilient-smoke referenced in Dev Agent Record / handoff
DLQ local filesystem; migration 054 additive PG projection (documented limit)

tests.focused_command: pytest tests/test_checkpoint.py tests/test_dlq.py tests/test_dlq_sync.py tests/test_local_resilience.py tests/test_pipeline_fault.py -k "checkpoint or resume or dlq" -q --no-cov
tests.broad_story_command: pytest tests/ -k "checkpoint or resume or dlq" -q --no-cov
tests.broad_result: 97 passed, 5 skipped, 2 failed (chaos fixture + opportunity DB tables)

issues.description: Broad -k selects tests/chaos/test_429_rate_limit.py (ResilienceConfig fixture drift TypeError) and tests/test_opportunity_integration.py (needs opportunity_checkpoints DB table). Outside story AC surface and no-DATABASE evidence policy.
issues.recommendation: Fix chaos _cfg; mark opportunity integration as requires_db / exclude from default -k smoke. Non-blocking for AC close.

residual_observations.description: DLQ is filesystem-local; PG projection via migration 054 is additive — not claimed as live PG operational readiness.
No claim of LOCAL_RESILIENCE_READY or PRE_VPS_FINAL_READY from this story close path.

forbidden_claims_intact: Status remains InReview — Done reserved for @po
notes: Independent adversarial QA. AC1–3 met on focused no-DB suites (49 passed). CONCERNS for broad residual (chaos fixture + DB integration noise) only — not AC failure.
